user.title: MQTT Broker Configuration
user.description:
Configure the shared MQTT broker that all instances will connect to.

**Security Warning:** If you enable dashboard sharing, an authentication token will be transmitted via MQTT. Make sure your MQTT broker uses authentication and TLS/SSL encryption.

instance.title: Instance Identification
instance.description: Give this Home Assistant instance a name that will be shown on other instances. The Instance ID is auto-generated and used internally.

selection.title: Share Devices & Entities
selection.description: Select which devices and entities to share. Read-write allows control from other instances, read-only only shares the state.

init.title: Shared Home Assistant Options
init.description:
Update sharing settings. Read-write allows control from other instances, read-only only shares the state.

**Dashboard Sharing:** Enable to share dashboards from this instance. Requires the instance URL to be set. A long-lived access token will be generated and shared via MQTT — ensure your broker is secured with authentication and TLS.
